title: Inconsistent work with non-explicit timezone
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
When table with DateTime/DateTime64 column created in session with not default timezone, this timezone is used in `where` condition until server restarted. After that default timezone is used.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```
set session_timezone='Asia/Istanbul';
create table mv (time DateTime) engine=MergeTree() order by time;
insert into mv values ('2025-01-01 04:00:00'),('2025-01-01 05:00:00'),('2025-01-01 06:00:00');
select * from mv where time>='2025-01-01 05:00:00'
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җtimeв”Җв”җ
1. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 05:00:00 в”Ӯ
2. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 06:00:00 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
2 rows in set.
```
Restart clickhouse server.
```
select * from mv where time>='2025-01-01 02:00:00';
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җtimeв”Җв”җ
1. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 02:00:00 в”Ӯ
2. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 03:00:00 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
2 rows in set.
set session_timezone='Asia/Istanbul';
select * from mv where time>='2025-01-01 02:00:00';
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җtimeв”Җв”җ
1. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 05:00:00 в”Ӯ
2. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 06:00:00 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
2 rows in set.
select * from mv where time>='2025-01-01 05:00:00';
Ok.
0 rows in set.
```
Before restart `where` condition uses `Asiz/Istanbul` timezone, after restart - `UTC`.
This is because table columns are created during `create table` query with actual on that moment timezone, and later this type is reused during filter step.
The same with views:
```
create table mv2 (time DateTime) engine=MergeTree() order by time;
insert into mv2 values ('2025-01-01 01:00:00'),('2025-01-01 02:00:00'),('2025-01-01 03:00:00');
create view v1 (time DateTime) as select * from mv2 settings session_timezone='Asia/Istanbul';
select * from v1 where time>='2025-01-01 02:00:00';
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җtimeв”Җв”җ
1. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 02:00:00 в”Ӯ
2. в”Ӯ 2025-01-01 03:00:00 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
create view v2 (time DateTime64) as select * from mv2 settings session_timezone='Asia/Istanbul';
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mv3 (time TIMESTAMP, value INTEGER);
CREATE VIEW v3 AS SELECT time, value FROM mv3 WHERE value > 1;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent timezone usage after server restart
